subject: Accounting
title: The Audit Opinion
description: A quick win: understand The Audit Opinion.

hook.text: Before trusting any financial statement, flip to the auditor's letter. It tells you everything.

buildup.text: An independent auditor reviews the statements and issues an opinion on their accuracy.

discovery.text: A 'clean' or unqualified opinion means the auditor found no major problems.

twist.text: A 'qualified' opinion means issues were found. A 'disclaimer' means the auditor couldn't verify.

climax.text: Going concern warnings in the audit letter have predicted company collapses many times.

punchline.text: The auditor's opinion is the trust rating of the numbers.

quiz.question: What does an unqualified audit opinion mean?
options: The company is unqualified for listing
The auditor couldn't complete the review
